hypothesis: Conformational strain energies computed by evaluating LoQI-generated solution-phase minima against experimentally observed bound ligand geometries (using AIMNet2) will exhibit an inverse Spearman correlation with measured binding affinities (pKi/pKD) that is at least 0.15 higher than the inverse Spearman correlation obtained using strain energies computed from RDKit ETKDG-generated minima.
